descriptionShort: Richmond Sockeyes defeat Humboldt Broncos 4-3 in overtime in Centennial Cup playoff series.
descriptionLong: Tony Bobbitt scored the overtime winner at 1:04 of extra time as the Richmond Sockeyes defeated the Humboldt Broncos 4-3 in a Centennial Cup junior hockey playoff game in Humboldt, Saskatchewan on April 22, 1987. The victory gave Richmond a 2-1 lead in the best-of-seven Tier 2 western final series. Tomlinson, Claringbull, and Clarke also scored for the Sockeyes, who trailed 1-0 after one period despite being outshot 39-23.

attribution.headline: Sockeyes Win Centennial Cup Playoff Game
